rule_detail: Economy passengers are allowed 1 checked bag up to 23kg and 1 cabin bag up to 7kg. Additional bags cost INR 2500 each. Excess weight charged at INR 350 per kg.
Business class passengers are allowed 2 checked bags up to 32kg each and 1 cabin bag up to 12kg. Additional bags cost INR 1500 each.
First class passengers are allowed 3 checked bags up to 40kg each and 2 cabin bags up to 15kg total.
Premium Economy passengers are allowed 2 checked bags up to 28kg each and 1 cabin bag up to 10kg.
Economy tickets cancelled more than 24 hours before departure receive 80% refund. 12-24 hours: 50% refund. Less than 12 hours: No refund.
Business tickets cancelled more than 24 hours before departure receive 90% refund. 12-24 hours: 70% refund. Less than 12 hours: 20% refund.

rule_summary: Full refund if cancelled 24h+ before departure
rule_detail: First class tickets are fully refundable if cancelled more than 24 hours before departure. 12-24 hours: 90% refund. Less than 12 hours: 50% refund.
Refunds are processed within 7-10 business days to the original payment method. Credit card refunds may take an additional 3-5 business days.
Business class refunds are prioritized and processed within 5-7 business days.
Passengers who do not show up at the gate without prior cancellation forfeit the full ticket amount regardless of fare class.
Economy ticket changes are allowed up to 4 hours before departure. A change fee of INR 1500 applies plus any fare difference.
Business ticket changes are allowed up to 2 hours before departure. A change fee of INR 500 applies plus any fare difference.

rule_summary: No change fee for First class
rule_detail: First class tickets can be changed at any time before departure at no charge. Fare difference may apply.
All passengers may carry one personal item free of charge in addition to their cabin allowance.

rule_summary: Web check-in opens 48 hours before departure
rule_detail: Web check-in is available from 48 hours and closes 2 hours before departure. Airport check-in closes 60 minutes before departure.
